examples.en: My grandfather has to check his blood sugar because of diabetes.
examples.zh: 我祖父因為糖尿病必須檢查血糖。

examples.en: Diabetes can be controlled with diet and medicine.
examples.zh: 糖尿病可以透過飲食和藥物控制。

img: blood sugar test meter with drop of blood

examples.en: The doctor said his hypertension is under control now.
examples.zh: 醫生說他的高血壓現在控制住了。

examples.en: Too much salt can lead to hypertension.
examples.zh: 攝取太多鹽分可能導致高血壓。

img: digital blood pressure monitor on arm

examples.en: She always carries an inhaler because of her asthma.
examples.zh: 她因為氣喘總是隨身帶著吸入器。

examples.en: Cold air can trigger an asthma attack.
examples.zh: 冷空氣可能引發氣喘發作。

img: asthma inhaler in hand

examples.en: He was hospitalized for a week with pneumonia.
examples.zh: 他因肺炎住院了一週。

examples.en: Pneumonia often causes a high fever and coughing.
examples.zh: 肺炎常引起高燒和咳嗽。

img: chest x-ray showing lungs on light box

examples.en: Early detection of cancer greatly improves survival.
examples.zh: 及早發現癌症能大幅提高存活率。

examples.en: She beat cancer after two years of treatment.
examples.zh: 她經過兩年治療後戰勝了癌症。

img: pink awareness ribbon on white background

examples.en: A stroke can affect a person's ability to speak.
examples.zh: 中風可能影響一個人說話的能力。

examples.en: He is recovering from a stroke at the hospital.
examples.zh: 他正在醫院裡從中風中復原。

img: elderly patient in wheelchair with therapist

examples.en: Arthritis makes it hard for her to open jars.
examples.zh: 關節炎讓她很難打開罐子。

examples.en: The pain from arthritis gets worse in cold weather.
examples.zh: 關節炎的疼痛在寒冷天氣時會加劇。

img: swollen painful hand joints close up

examples.en: She had to lie down in a dark room during her migraine.
examples.zh: 偏頭痛發作時她必須躺在暗房裡。

examples.en: Bright lights often make his migraine worse.
examples.zh: 強光常使他的偏頭痛惡化。

img: person holding head in pain in dark room

examples.en: Obesity raises the risk of heart disease.
examples.zh: 肥胖症提高罹患心臟病的風險。

examples.en: Doctors recommend exercise to fight obesity.
examples.zh: 醫生建議運動來對抗肥胖症。

img: weighing scale with measuring tape

examples.en: He has a serious allergy to peanuts.
examples.zh: 他對花生有嚴重過敏。

examples.en: Her pollen allergy acts up every spring.
examples.zh: 她的花粉過敏每年春天都會發作。

img: person sneezing near blooming flowers

examples.en: The wound got an infection and turned red.
examples.zh: 傷口感染了並且變紅。

examples.en: Antibiotics are used to treat bacterial infection.
examples.zh: 抗生素用來治療細菌感染。

img: red infected wound on skin

examples.en: Depression is a real illness that needs treatment.
examples.zh: 憂鬱症是一種需要治療的真實疾病。

examples.en: Talking to a therapist helped her depression.
examples.zh: 與治療師談話改善了她的憂鬱症。

img: sad person sitting alone by window

examples.en: He needs surgery to repair his broken knee.
examples.zh: 他需要手術來修復受傷的膝蓋。

examples.en: The surgery lasted about three hours.
examples.zh: 這場手術大約持續三小時。

img: surgeons operating in operating room

examples.en: The operation on her heart was successful.
examples.zh: 她的心臟手術很成功。

examples.en: He will have an operation tomorrow morning.
examples.zh: 他明天早上要開刀。

img: operating table under bright surgical lights

examples.en: He is waiting for a kidney transplant.
examples.zh: 他正在等待腎臟移植。

examples.en: A heart transplant saved the young boy's life.
examples.zh: 心臟移植救了那個小男孩的命。

img: surgeons carrying medical cooler for organ

examples.en: You will be asleep under general anesthesia.
examples.zh: 在全身麻醉下你會睡著。

examples.en: The dentist used local anesthesia to numb her gum.
examples.zh: 牙醫用局部麻醉讓她的牙齦失去知覺。

img: anesthesia mask over patient face

examples.en: The doctor gave a clear diagnosis after the tests.
examples.zh: 醫生在檢查後給出明確的診斷。

examples.en: An early diagnosis can save lives.
examples.zh: 早期診斷能拯救生命。

img: doctor reviewing medical chart with patient

examples.en: The treatment for his illness takes six months.
examples.zh: 他的病症治療需要六個月。

examples.en: She responded well to the new treatment.
examples.zh: 她對新的治療反應良好。

img: nurse giving patient medicine at bedside

examples.en: Physical therapy helped him walk again.
examples.zh: 物理治療幫助他再次行走。

examples.en: She goes to therapy twice a week.
examples.zh: 她每週去做兩次治療。

img: therapist helping patient with exercise band

examples.en: Chemotherapy made her lose her hair.
examples.zh: 化療讓她掉了頭髮。

examples.en: He starts chemotherapy next Monday.
examples.zh: 他下週一開始化療。

img: patient receiving IV drip in treatment chair

examples.en: The flu vaccine is available every autumn.
examples.zh: 流感疫苗每年秋天都會提供。

examples.en: A new vaccine was developed to fight the virus.
examples.zh: 為了對抗病毒開發出一種新疫苗。

img: vaccine vial and syringe on tray

examples.en: The doctor prescribed an antibiotic for his throat.
examples.zh: 醫生為他的喉嚨開了抗生素。

examples.en: You must finish the whole course of antibiotics.
examples.zh: 你必須吃完整個療程的抗生素。

img: capsule pills spilling from bottle

examples.en: You need a prescription to buy this medicine.
examples.zh: 你需要處方箋才能買這種藥。

examples.en: The pharmacist filled her prescription quickly.
examples.zh: 藥劑師很快備好她的處方藥。

img: handwritten prescription paper with pen

examples.en: A high fever is a common symptom of the flu.
examples.zh: 高燒是流感常見的症狀。

examples.en: Tell the doctor about all your symptoms.
examples.zh: 把你所有的症狀都告訴醫生。

img: checklist of health symptoms on clipboard

examples.en: His recovery after surgery was surprisingly fast.
examples.zh: 他手術後的康復出奇地快。

examples.en: Rest is important for a full recovery.
examples.zh: 休息對於完全康復很重要。

img: patient walking in hospital hallway with support

examples.en: He was referred to the cardiology department.
examples.zh: 他被轉診到心臟科。

examples.en: Cardiology deals with diseases of the heart.
examples.zh: 心臟科處理心臟相關的疾病。

img: heart shaped stethoscope on ecg chart

examples.en: The pediatrics ward is full of colorful toys.
examples.zh: 小兒科病房裡滿是彩色玩具。

examples.en: She works as a nurse in pediatrics.
examples.zh: 她在小兒科擔任護理師。

img: doctor examining child with toys around

examples.en: She visited dermatology for her skin rash.
examples.zh: 她因皮膚疹去看皮膚科。

examples.en: Dermatology treats problems of the skin.
examples.zh: 皮膚科治療皮膚的問題。

img: doctor examining skin with magnifier

examples.en: The neurology team studied his brain scan.
examples.zh: 神經科團隊研究了他的腦部掃描。

examples.en: Neurology focuses on the nervous system.
examples.zh: 神經科專注於神經系統。

img: brain scan images on computer screen

examples.en: He went to orthopedics for his broken arm.
examples.zh: 他因手臂骨折去看骨科。

examples.en: Orthopedics deals with bones and joints.
examples.zh: 骨科處理骨頭和關節的問題。

img: x-ray of bone with orthopedic model

examples.en: She was referred to psychiatry for her anxiety.
examples.zh: 她因焦慮被轉介到精神科。

examples.en: Psychiatry treats mental health problems.
examples.zh: 精神科治療心理健康問題。

img: patient talking with psychiatrist in office

examples.en: They rushed him to the emergency room.
examples.zh: 他們把他緊急送往急診室。

examples.en: Call an ambulance in a medical emergency.
examples.zh: 遇到醫療緊急情況時要叫救護車。

img: emergency room entrance red sign

examples.en: The ambulance arrived within five minutes.
examples.zh: 救護車在五分鐘內抵達。

examples.en: An ambulance carried the injured man away.
examples.zh: 一輛救護車載走了受傷的男子。

img: white ambulance with flashing lights

examples.en: Her family physician knows her whole history.
examples.zh: 她的家庭醫師了解她全部的病史。

examples.en: The physician advised him to rest more.
examples.zh: 醫師建議他多休息。

img: doctor in white coat with clipboard

examples.en: The surgeon explained the risks before the operation.
examples.zh: 外科醫師在手術前說明了風險。

examples.en: She trained for years to become a surgeon.
examples.zh: 她受訓多年才成為外科醫師。

img: surgeon in scrubs and mask holding tools

examples.en: I picked up my medicine at the pharmacy.
examples.zh: 我在藥局拿了我的藥。

examples.en: The pharmacy is open until midnight.
examples.zh: 這間藥局營業到午夜。

img: pharmacy counter with shelves of medicine

examples.en: There is a small clinic near my house.
examples.zh: 我家附近有一間小診所。

examples.en: The clinic offers free health checks.
examples.zh: 這間診所提供免費健康檢查。

img: small medical clinic reception desk

examples.en: He suffers from chronic back pain.
examples.zh: 他受慢性背痛所苦。

examples.en: Chronic illness requires long-term care.
examples.zh: 慢性疾病需要長期照護。

img: elderly person rubbing sore lower back

examples.en: The flu is highly contagious in winter.
examples.zh: 流感在冬天具有高度傳染性。

examples.en: Stay home if you have a contagious disease.
examples.zh: 如果你得了傳染病就待在家裡。

img: person wearing face mask coughing

examples.en: Ice can reduce the inflammation in his ankle.
examples.zh: 冰敷可以減少他腳踝的發炎。

examples.en: The medicine helps ease inflammation.
examples.zh: 這種藥有助於減緩發炎。

img: red swollen ankle with ice pack

examples.en: The scan showed a small tumor in his lung.
examples.zh: 掃描顯示他的肺部有一個小腫瘤。

examples.en: The doctors removed the tumor safely.
examples.zh: 醫生安全地移除了腫瘤。

img: mri scan highlighting a mass

examples.en: He got a fracture after falling off his bike.
examples.zh: 他從腳踏車上摔下來後骨折了。

examples.en: The fracture will take six weeks to heal.
examples.zh: 這處骨折需要六週才能癒合。

img: arm in white cast with sling

examples.en: The nurse cleaned the wound carefully.
examples.zh: 護理師仔細地清理了傷口。

examples.en: Keep the wound dry to help it heal.
examples.zh: 保持傷口乾燥以幫助癒合。

img: bandaged wound on arm

examples.en: She wrapped a bandage around his knee.
examples.zh: 她在他的膝蓋上纏了繃帶。

examples.en: Change the bandage every day.
examples.zh: 每天更換繃帶。

img: rolled white bandage and first aid kit

examples.en: The nurse gave him an injection in his arm.
examples.zh: 護理師在他的手臂上打了一針。

examples.en: This injection may cause slight pain.
examples.zh: 這一針可能會有點痛。

img: nurse giving injection into upper arm

examples.en: I have a yearly checkup with my doctor.
examples.zh: 我每年都和醫生做一次健康檢查。

examples.en: The checkup showed he was in good health.
examples.zh: 健康檢查顯示他身體狀況良好。

img: doctor listening to patient with stethoscope

examples.en: A sleep disorder keeps her awake at night.
examples.zh: 睡眠失調讓她晚上無法入睡。

examples.en: The doctor diagnosed an eating disorder.
examples.zh: 醫生診斷出飲食失調。

img: tired person lying awake in bed at night

examples.en: A strong immune system fights off disease.
examples.zh: 強健的免疫系統能抵抗疾病。

examples.en: Sleep helps keep your immune system healthy.
examples.zh: 睡眠有助於維持免疫系統健康。

img: illustration of white blood cells fighting virus

examples.en: The flu epidemic spread across the whole city.
examples.zh: 流感疫情蔓延到整座城市。

examples.en: Doctors worked hard to stop the epidemic.
examples.zh: 醫生們努力遏止這場流行病。

img: crowd of people wearing masks in city

examples.en: He spent months in rehabilitation after the accident.
examples.zh: 意外之後他花了好幾個月做復健。

examples.en: Rehabilitation helped her regain her strength.
examples.zh: 復健幫助她恢復體力。

img: patient doing rehab exercises with therapist
